_comment: Example 4 — Low-impact public marketing site. Public information only, relaxed RTO/RPO, no sensitive data. Exercises: LOW categorization floor, Public data classification, minimal compliance scope, validation clarification path (public users without confidentiality flag).

business.businessProblem: Public-facing marketing pages and a leads form, replacing a CMS that the marketing team can no longer maintain.
business.userInteractionDescription: Anonymous visitors browse pages; a small percentage submits a leads form with name and email.

impact.confidentialityWorstCase: Minor embarrassment if defaced or vandalised.
impact.integrityWorstCase: Minor — incorrect content can be reverted quickly.
impact.availabilityWorstCase: Lost lead capture during outage; competitive disadvantage but no regulatory impact.
